content: I've been so busy with wedding planning and my new online course that I've barely had time to think about my own fitness goals.
It sounds like you've got a lot on your plate! Congratulations on starting your online course, by the way. What's it about?
Thanks! It's about wedding planning, actually. I've been in the industry for years and I wanted to share my knowledge with others. I've also been trying to make time for surfing, which I love.
That's a great idea for a course! Surfing is a wonderful way to stay active and relaxed. Do you have a favorite surf spot?
I love surfing in California, near my home in Los Angeles. There's something about being in the ocean that just clears my mind.
California has some amazing surf spots! It's great that you're prioritizing your own hobbies and interests amidst your busy schedule. What's your goal for your online course?
I'd like to launch it by June 1st and have at least 100 students enrolled within the first month. It's a bit ambitious, but I think it's doable.
That's a great goal! You seem like a very driven person. How do you plan on balancing your work and personal life while launching your course?
It's going to be tough, but I'm trying to set boundaries and prioritize my own self-care. I've been knitting to relax and it's been really helping me unwind.
Knitting is a great way to relax! It's wonderful that you're making time for activities that bring you joy. Do you have a favorite type of knitting project?
I love knitting scarves and hats. I've been making some for my friends and family as gifts.
That's so thoughtful of you! Homemade gifts are always special. Maybe you can even offer knitting as a stress-relief activity in your online course?
Ha! That's not a bad idea. I'll have to consider it. I've also been thinking about starting a travel blog to document my adventures.
A travel blog sounds like a great idea! You could share your surfing and knitting adventures with your readers.
Exactly! I love writing and photography, so it would be a great way for me to express myself creatively.
That's wonderful! It's great that you're exploring different creative outlets. Maybe you can even offer a discount on your online course to your travel blog readers?
That's a great idea! I'll have to think about it. Thanks for the suggestions and support.
You're welcome! It was great chatting with you. Good luck with your online course and travel blog!
